username.description: Campaign Monitor API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: HTTP Basic auth password. Campaign Monitor allows this to be blank or a dummy value alongside the API key username; never logged.

base_url.description: Campaign Monitor API base URL override for tests or proxies.

client_id.description: Campaign Monitor client id, required for every client-scoped stream ('campaigns', 'lists', 'suppressionlist', 'segments', 'templates') and every list-scoped fan-out stream ('list_custom_fields', 'list_webhooks', 'active_subscribers', 'unconfirmed_subscribers', 'unsubscribed_subscribers', 'bounced_subscribers', 'deleted_subscribers'), which fan out over this client's own lists.
